untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) momentum decline tracking over 3+ consecutive periods - no allowed indicator supports multi-bar momentum comparison without array indexing; (2) institutional distribution detection via widening bid-ask spreads - bid-ask data not available in indicator list; (3) RSI divergence detection (price new high vs RSI) - requires pattern recognition logic beyond simple operator conditions
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using: RSI comparison to previous close as proxy for momentum decline, ATR above SMA_20 as volatility elevation proxy (ATR_20 vs SMA_20 ≈ 25% threshold), and RSI threshold levels (65/35) for reversion signals. However, core logic of 3+ consecutive period momentum loss and RSI divergence cannot be expressed within constraint rules without array indexing or pattern detection operators.
